name: es-membrane
description: An ECMAScript implementation of a Membrane, allowing users to dynamically hide, override, or extend objects in JavaScript with controlled effects on the original objects.

//.debug: Debugging this code requires Node 18.  Node 20 will fail to start running your code when using --inspect-brk and --import.

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run tsc-buildsystem && node --expose-gc --no-experimental-require-module ../../node_modules/gulp/bin/gulp.js
scripts.debug: npm run clean && npm run tsc-buildsystem && node --inspect-brk --expose-gc --no-experimental-require-module ../../node_modules/gulp/bin/gulp.js
scripts.tasks: npm run clean && npm run tsc-buildsystem && gulp --tasks

author: Alexander J. Vincent <ajvincent@gmail.com>
